title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero from Cursor discusses how agentic workflows are being deployed across the software development lifecycle to move beyond the 40% productivity plateau that AI coding assistants typically reach. The talk covers specific agent applications including bug triage, security review, PM/EM assistance, and growth experimentation, along with architectural patterns and organizational changes needed to scale agent systems.
